standards: NIST AM Bench — DED parameter guidelines

issues.message: 36 faces (0.0%) below 1.5mm min wall for ded. Thinnest: 1.49mm.
issues.fix_suggestion: Increase wall thickness to >= 1.5mm. DED bead width ~2-4mm; 1.5mm min wall.

issues.message: 29991 faces (26.7%) exceed 60.0° overhang threshold for ded. Supports required.
issues.fix_suggestion: Reorient part or redesign overhangs < 60.0° for ded. Multi-axis DED: 60° threshold.

issues.message: DED produces near-net shapes (Ra 15-40µm). Add 2-5mm machining stock on all critical surfaces.
issues.fix_suggestion: Design with 2-5mm extra material on tolerance surfaces. Plan hybrid DED + CNC workflow. ASTM F3187 §7.

issues.message: 86 faces (0.1%) below 2.0mm min wall for waam. Thinnest: 1.49mm.
issues.fix_suggestion: Increase wall thickness to >= 2.0mm. WAAM bead width 4-8mm; 2mm min wall.

issues.message: 29991 faces (26.7%) exceed 60.0° overhang threshold for waam. Supports required.
issues.fix_suggestion: Reorient part or redesign overhangs < 60.0° for waam. Multi-axis WAAM: 60° practical limit.

issues.message: WAAM is near-net; all surfaces need 3-5mm post-machining stock. Plan hybrid WAAM + CNC.
issues.fix_suggestion: Add 3-5mm stock on tolerance surfaces.

standards: DIN 6935 — Cold bending of flat steel

issues.fix_suggestion: Use plate CNC machining for thick stock.

issues.message: 44242 sidewall faces (99.0% of sidewall area) below 3.0° draft for sand_casting.
issues.fix_suggestion: Add >= 3.0° draft to all walls in pull direction. AFS: 3° min — rougher mold surface.
Increase to >= 3.0mm. AFS: 3mm min gray iron, 5mm steel.

issues.message: Max wall 406.4mm > 100.0mm — sink marks / long cycle.
issues.fix_suggestion: Core out thick sections. Target 8.0mm. AFS: 3mm min gray iron, 5mm steel.

issues.message: Wall ratio 273.1:1 (1.5–406.4mm) causes warping in sand_casting.
issues.fix_suggestion: Aim for uniform 8.0mm. Use ribs, not solid. AFS: 3mm min gray iron, 5mm steel.

issues.message: 168641 sharp internal corners need >= 3.0mm fillets for sand_casting flow and stress distribution.
issues.fix_suggestion: Add 3.0mm+ fillets. AFS: 3mm min fillet — hot tear prevention.

issues.message: V/SA ratio 14.8mm — bulky sections cause shrinkage porosity in sand_casting.
issues.fix_suggestion: Core out thick sections for even cooling.

Remove undercuts or plan multi-setup machining. 3-axis: tool access from +Z only.

Alternative: Switch to 5-axis CNC, or redesign to eliminate undercuts.

issues.message: 2009 sharp concave edges — tool radius 0.5mm cannot reach. Applies to cnc_3axis.
issues.fix_suggestion: Add fillets >= 0.5mm to internal corners. Sandvik: smallest end mill 1mm Ø → 0.5mm radius.

issues.message: Part exceeds build envelope for cnc_3axis: Y: 559mm > 406mm. Haas VF-2 (30x16x20 in).
issues.fix_suggestion: Scale down, split part, or use a larger machine.
Remove undercuts or plan multi-setup machining. 5-axis may reach — verify tool clearance.

issues.message: 2009 sharp concave edges — tool radius 0.5mm cannot reach. Applies to cnc_5axis.
issues.fix_suggestion: Add fillets >= 0.5mm to internal corners. Sandvik: 1mm end mill → 0.5mm radius min.

issues.message: Part exceeds build envelope for cnc_5axis: X: 527mm > 500mm, Y: 559mm > 450mm, Z: 483mm > 400mm. DMG MORI DMU 50.
issues.fix_suggestion: Scale down, split part, or use a larger machine.

issues.message: 30824 faces (27.4%) exceed 45.0° overhang threshold for fdm. Supports required.
issues.fix_suggestion:
Reorient part or redesign overhangs < 45.0° for fdm. ISO/ASTM 52910:2018 §5.3.

Alternative: SLS/MJF are self-supporting (no overhang limits). Or redesign with <45° angles.

issues.message: Part exceeds build envelope for fdm: X: 527mm > 300mm, Y: 559mm > 300mm, Z: 483mm > 350mm. Bambu Lab X1C / Prusa MK4.
issues.fix_suggestion:
Scale down, split part, or use a larger machine.

Alternative: Use BigRep (1m³) or split into multiple parts.

issues.message: 31858 faces (28.3%) exceed 19.0° overhang threshold for sla. Supports required.
issues.fix_suggestion: Reorient part or redesign overhangs < 19.0° for sla. Formlabs: 19° from horizontal without support.

issues.message: Part exceeds build envelope for sla: X: 527mm > 200mm, Y: 559mm > 125mm, Z: 483mm > 210mm. Formlabs Form 4.
issues.fix_suggestion:
Scale down, split part, or use a larger machine.

Alternative: Switch to FDM/SLS for larger build volumes.

issues.message: Large downward-facing area (232286mm², 27%) — resin cupping / suction risk during peel.
issues.fix_suggestion: Add drain holes, tilt part 10-15°, or orient concave side up.

issues.message: 31636 faces (28.1%) exceed 30.0° overhang threshold for dlp. Supports required.
issues.fix_suggestion: Reorient part or redesign overhangs < 30.0° for dlp. DLP typically 30° from vertical.

issues.message: Part exceeds build envelope for dlp: X: 527mm > 218mm, Y: 559mm > 123mm, Z: 483mm > 250mm. Elegoo Saturn 4 Ultra.
issues.fix_suggestion: Scale down, split part, or use a larger machine.

issues.message: Part exceeds build envelope for sls: X: 527mm > 340mm, Y: 559mm > 340mm. EOS P 396.
issues.fix_suggestion: Scale down, split part, or use a larger machine.

issues.message: Part exceeds build envelope for mjf: X: 527mm > 380mm, Y: 559mm > 284mm, Z: 483mm > 380mm. HP Jet Fusion 5200.
issues.fix_suggestion: Scale down, split part, or use a larger machine.

issues.message: 30824 faces (27.4%) exceed 45.0° overhang threshold for dmls. Supports required.
issues.fix_suggestion:
Reorient part or redesign overhangs < 45.0° for dmls. EOS DMLS best practice: 45° support threshold.

Alternative: Consider redesigning overhangs or switching to EBM (50° threshold).

issues.message: Part exceeds build envelope for dmls: X: 527mm > 400mm, Y: 559mm > 400mm, Z: 483mm > 400mm. EOS M 400-4.
issues.fix_suggestion:
Scale down, split part, or use a larger machine.

Alternative: Consider DED/WAAM for large metal parts (up to 5m).

issues.message: Large horizontal surface (179984mm², 21% of total) — curl risk in dmls.
issues.fix_suggestion: Add breakup features or reorient. HIP recommended. AMS 7003: HIP/stress-relief mandatory for Ti.

issues.message: 30824 faces (27.4%) exceed 45.0° overhang threshold for slm. Supports required.
issues.fix_suggestion: Reorient part or redesign overhangs < 45.0° for slm. SLM 45° support threshold.

issues.message: Part exceeds build envelope for slm: X: 527mm > 500mm, Y: 559mm > 280mm, Z: 483mm > 365mm. SLM 500.
issues.fix_suggestion: Scale down, split part, or use a larger machine.

issues.message: Large horizontal surface (179984mm², 21% of total) — curl risk in slm.
issues.fix_suggestion: Add breakup features or reorient. HIP recommended. Stress relief required per AMS 7003.

issues.message: 30017 faces (26.7%) exceed 50.0° overhang threshold for ebm. Supports required.
issues.fix_suggestion: Reorient part or redesign overhangs < 50.0° for ebm. Arcam: 50° threshold (pre-heat reduces curl).

issues.message: Part exceeds build envelope for ebm: X: 527mm > 350mm, Y: 559mm > 380mm, Z: 483mm > 380mm. Arcam Q20plus.
issues.fix_suggestion: Scale down, split part, or use a larger machine.

standards: Desktop Metal Shop System Design Guide

issues.message: Part exceeds build envelope for binder_jetting: Y: 559mm > 500mm, Z: 483mm > 400mm. ExOne S-Max Pro.
issues.fix_suggestion: Scale down, split part, or use a larger machine.

issues.message: Binder jetting parts shrink 15-20% during sintering. Ensure CAD model is scaled to compensate.
issues.fix_suggestion: Scale model 1.18–1.22x to compensate for sintering shrinkage. Desktop Metal Studio pre-compensates automatically.

issues.message: Part exceeds build envelope for cnc_turning: X: 527mm > 254mm, Y: 559mm > 254mm. Haas ST-20 (10in chuck).
issues.fix_suggestion: Scale down, split part, or use a larger machine.

standards: Mitsubishi Electric wire EDM design guide

issues.message: Part exceeds build envelope for wire_edm: Y: 559mm > 400mm, Z: 483mm > 350mm. Sodick ALC600G.
issues.fix_suggestion: Scale down, split part, or use a larger machine.

issues.message: Wire EDM requires electrically conductive material.
issues.fix_suggestion: Verify material is conductive (metals only). Ceramics / polymers cannot be wire-EDM'd.

standards: GE Plastics Design Guide — wall thickness

issues.message: 40377 sidewall faces (90.9% of sidewall area) below 1.0° draft for injection_molding.
issues.fix_suggestion:
Add >= 1.0° draft to all walls in pull direction. Protolabs: 1° min external, 2° internal.

Alternative: Add 1-3° draft to all vertical walls. No draft needed for CNC or additive.

issues.message: Max wall 406.4mm > 6.0mm — sink marks / long cycle.
issues.fix_suggestion: Core out thick sections. Target 2.5mm. GE Plastics: 0.5–6mm, ideal 2.5mm for ABS.

issues.message: Wall ratio 273.1:1 (1.5–406.4mm) causes warping in injection_molding.
issues.fix_suggestion: Aim for uniform 2.5mm. Use ribs, not solid. GE Plastics: 0.5–6mm, ideal 2.5mm for ABS.

issues.message: 28865 faces form undercuts requiring side actions in injection_molding tooling.
issues.fix_suggestion: Redesign to eliminate undercuts or add slides. Side actions add $5–15K tooling.

issues.message: Ribs should be <= 0.6x adjacent wall thickness with 0.5° draft per side. Height <= 3x wall.
issues.fix_suggestion: Verify ribs per Protolabs IM guide §4.3.

issues.message: Boss at (-204, -3, 23) has 2.5mm OD — wall may be too thin for molding.
issues.fix_suggestion: Boss OD should be >= 2x ID. Add gussets.

issues.fix_suggestion: Boss OD should be >= 2x ID. Add gussets.

issues.message: 40377 sidewall faces (90.9% of sidewall area) below 1.0° draft for die_casting.
issues.fix_suggestion: Add >= 1.0° draft to all walls in pull direction. NADCA §3: 1° min external, 2° internal.

issues.message: Max wall 406.4mm > 12.0mm — sink marks / long cycle.
issues.fix_suggestion: Core out thick sections. Target 3.0mm. NADCA: 0.8–12mm, uniform preferred.

issues.message: Wall ratio 273.1:1 (1.5–406.4mm) causes warping in die_casting.
issues.fix_suggestion: Aim for uniform 3.0mm. Use ribs, not solid. NADCA: 0.8–12mm, uniform preferred.

issues.message: 168641 sharp internal corners need >= 1.0mm fillets for die_casting flow and stress distribution.
issues.fix_suggestion: Add 1.0mm+ fillets. NADCA: 1mm min fillet at internal corners.

issues.message: 28865 faces form undercuts requiring side actions in die_casting tooling.
issues.fix_suggestion: Redesign to eliminate undercuts or add slides. Slides required — adds tooling cost.

issues.message: 38635 sidewall faces (86.9% of sidewall area) below 0.5° draft for investment_casting.
issues.fix_suggestion: Add >= 0.5° draft to all walls in pull direction. ICI: 0.5° min — less than other casting methods.

citation.text: 0.5° min — less than other casting methods.

issues.message: Max wall 406.4mm > 50.0mm — sink marks / long cycle.
issues.fix_suggestion: Core out thick sections. Target 5.0mm. ICI: 1mm min wall achievable.

issues.message: Wall ratio 273.1:1 (1.5–406.4mm) causes warping in investment_casting.
issues.fix_suggestion: Aim for uniform 5.0mm. Use ribs, not solid. ICI: 1mm min wall achievable.

issues.message: 168641 sharp internal corners need >= 0.5mm fillets for investment_casting flow and stress distribution.
issues.fix_suggestion: Add 0.5mm+ fillets. ICI: 0.5mm min fillet.

issues.message: 44688 sidewall faces (99.8% of sidewall area) below 5.0° draft for forging.
issues.fix_suggestion: Add >= 5.0° draft to all walls in pull direction. FIA: 5° external, 7-10° internal.

issues.message: 168641 sharp internal corners need >= 3.0mm fillets for forging flow and stress distribution.
issues.fix_suggestion: Add 3.0mm+ fillets. FIA: 3mm min corner radius for die life.

citation.text: 3mm min corner radius for die life.

issues.fix_suggestion: Remove undercuts or plan multi-setup machining. Forging: no undercuts — die cannot open.

citation.text: Forging: no undercuts — die cannot open

issues.message: 174 faces (0.2%) below 3.0mm min wall for forging. Thinnest: 1.49mm.
issues.fix_suggestion: Increase wall thickness to >= 3.0mm. FIA: 3mm min web thickness.
